suggestion.suspectedRootCause: 设置首页 TopLevelSettings/DashboardFragment 在快速滑动时于主线程同步刷新 dashboard 数据,导致 SettingsList refresh 单帧耗时 186ms(远超 16ms 帧预算),阻塞 UI 线程触发 Choreographer 丢帧;与历史 HIST-SET-001 同因。因日志含 Choreographer skipped frames,按 system-map settings_home_jank 升级规则建议同步 framework 复核主线程阻塞来源(ActivityThread)。

duplicate.reason: 当前缺陷的标题、描述与关键日志(SettingsList refresh timeout / 快速滑动掉帧)与 HIST-SET-001 完全一致;duplicate-pairs.yaml 已明确将 HIST-SET-014、HIST-SET-051 判定为 HIST-SET-001 的重复,理由均为 SettingsList refresh timeout 致设置首页快速滑动掉帧。

evidenceRefs.note: system-map flow settings_home_jank primary;HIST-SET-001 命中路径;routing-rules settings 模块首条路径
system-map flow settings_home_jank primary,dashboard 同步刷新疑似主线程阻塞点
标题/正文/日志与当前缺陷完全一致,为该重复簇 primary
duplicate-pairs:都是 SettingsList refresh timeout 导致设置首页快速滑动掉帧
duplicate-pairs:TopLevelSettings 与 SettingsList refresh timeout 同因

evidenceRefs.ref: SettingsList refresh timeout at frame=42 cost=186ms
evidenceRefs.note: 单帧刷新 186ms 远超 16ms 帧预算,主线程被 dashboard 刷新阻塞的直接证据
命中 system-map settings_home_jank 升级关键字(Choreographer skipped frames),触发 framework 同步复核
